articles.title: Supreme Court clears Texas’s new House map for 2026, sharpening the fight over race, partisanship and the midterms
articles.summary: The justices’ emergency order means Texas can use a Republican-friendlier congressional map next year while litigation continues over whether the Legislature unlawfully relied on race, intensifying a redistricting fight with implications well beyond the Lone Star State.

articles.title: Inside the ham radio licensing bump: why a 20th-century hobby keeps recruiting in 2026
articles.summary: A quiet corner of civic infrastructure is having a real moment. New license filings, disaster-readiness concerns, cheaper digital tools, and a broader maker culture are bringing fresh operators into amateur radio — while longtime hams worry the hobby can become more fragmented, more technical, and less social.
